meta.reasoning: T3 ACAT-Empirica Integration complete. Noetic phase: integration protocol designed with separate measurement windows, one-way grounding linkage, F-50 firewall, cross-instrument validation matrix (5 hypotheses), dashboard prototype. Praxic phase: Supabase schema implemented (materialized view + trigger + function + table), dashboard queries written (5 types), Q2 2026 pilot plan detailed (Phase A/B/C timeline, success metrics, failure modes). All SQL + pilot plan committed (commit 3a4242b). Integration ready for cortex mesh implementation. Next: T4 (cortex SER creation + practice registration).
